justification: The diff correctly updates dependencies to modern versions (Spring 6, Hibernate 6, Jakarta EE 10) and adopts Java 21 compiler settings. It uses pattern matching for instanceof (line 31 in SecurityServiceImpl.java) and String.formatted() (line 49), and removes deprecated @Autowired annotations in favor of constructor injection. However, it misses updating spring-data-jpa to a compatible version (still 1.10.6.RELEASE which is incompatible with Spring 6/Hibernate 6), and the test file update is incomplete (only imports changed, no test methods shown). The diff is coherent but the dependency mismatch is a significant oversight.
